flags.note: These passages closely follow Stefan Jansak's 1929 survey style and vocabulary (archaic words "nivo", "cini", point-lettered wall descriptions a-b/c-d/e-f matching the protected Jansak quote in prasnik-hradok-osada-u-fajnorov).
